Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. William Blake, Remote by the Sea 58 upvotes, 1 comments
  2. OpenGridWorks: The Electricity Infrasctructure, Mapped 46 upvotes, 2 comments
  3. Agents of Chaos 73 upvotes, 5 comments
  4. Researchers find 3,500-year-old loom that reveals textile revolution 79 upvotes, 6 comments
  5. Clojure: The Documentary, official trailer [video] 21 upvotes, 0 comments
  6. Cherri – programming language that compiles to an Apple Shortuct 262 upvotes, 48 comments
  7. Incident March 30th, 2026 – Accidental CDN Caching 12 upvotes, 0 comments
  8. Fedware: Government apps that spy harder than the apps they ban 434 upvotes, 134 comments
  9. How to turn anything into a router 597 upvotes, 211 comments
  10. Do your own writing 379 upvotes, 130 comments
  11. Roulette Computers: Hidden Devices That Predict Spins 74 upvotes, 22 comments
  12. Mathematical methods and human thought in the age of AI 195 upvotes, 78 comments
  13. Recover Apple Keychain 62 upvotes, 20 comments
  14. A sea of sparks: Seeing radioactivity 55 upvotes, 18 comments
  15. Build123d: A Python CAD programming library 122 upvotes, 49 comments
  16. Turning a MacBook into a touchscreen with $1 of hardware (2018) 210 upvotes, 93 comments
  17. Take better notes, by hand 177 upvotes, 81 comments
  18. Seeing Like a Spreadsheet 76 upvotes, 30 comments
  19. Show HN: Coasts – Containerized Hosts for Agents 59 upvotes, 22 comments
  20. FTC action against Match and OkCupid for deceiving users, sharing personal data 260 upvotes, 131 comments
  21. Universal Claude.md – cut Claude output tokens by 63% 57 upvotes, 24 comments
  22. Learn Claude Code by doing, not reading 161 upvotes, 84 comments
  23. CodingFont: A game to help you pick a coding font 316 upvotes, 182 comments
  24. Bird brains (2023) 296 upvotes, 186 comments
  25. Principles and Gear 7 upvotes, 1 comments
  26. I am definitely missing the pre-AI writing era 274 upvotes, 208 comments
  27. Why I'm betting on ATProto (and why you should, too) 79 upvotes, 55 comments
  28. Android Developer Verification 154 upvotes, 134 comments
  29. In math, rigor is vital, but are digitized proofs taking it too far? 106 upvotes, 98 comments
  30. IronGlass Brings Legendary Soviet Cinema Lenses to Mirrorless Cameras 22 upvotes, 16 comments
